content.json:
## Business Metrics Dashboard
High-level product health. **User** = distinct `user_Id` (stable per install/machine), not per-session.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name endswith "/extension.activated"
| summarize DAU = dcount(user_Id) by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by Day asc
| render timechart
content.title: Daily Active Users (DAU)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name endswith "/extension.activated"
| summarize MAU = dcount(user_Id) by Month = startofmonth(timestamp)
| order by Month asc
| render columnchart
content.title: Monthly Active Users (MAU)

content.query:
let activity = customEvents
    | where name endswith "/extension.activated"
    | summarize by user_Id, day = bin(timestamp, 1d);
let dau = activity | summarize DAU = dcount(user_Id) by day;
let mau = activity
    | mv-expand offset = range(0, 27, 1) to typeof(long)
    | extend windowDay = day + offset * 1d
    | summarize MAU = dcount(user_Id) by day = windowDay;
dau
| join kind=inner mau on day
| project day, DAU, MAU, StickinessPct = round(100.0 * DAU / MAU, 1)
| order by day asc
| render timechart
content.title: Stickiness (DAU / trailing-28d MAU %) — higher means users return more often

content.query:
customEvents
| where name endswith "/extension.activated"
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id) by Week = startofweek(timestamp)
| order by Week asc
| extend PrevWeek = prev(Users)
| extend GrowthPct = iif(isnull(PrevWeek) or PrevWeek == 0, real(null), round(100.0 * (Users - PrevWeek) / PrevWeek, 1))
| project Week, Users, GrowthPct
content.title: Week-over-Week User Growth

content.query:
let firstSeen = customEvents
    | where name endswith "/extension.activated"
    | summarize firstDay = min(bin(timestamp, 1d)) by user_Id;
customEvents
| where name endswith "/extension.activated"
| project user_Id, day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| join kind=inner firstSeen on user_Id
| extend Cohort = iif(day == firstDay, "New", "Returning")
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id) by day, Cohort
| order by day asc
| render columnchart
content.title: New vs Returning Users

content.query:
customEvents
| where name matches regex "[Oo]pened$"
| summarize FeaturesUsed = dcount(name) by Session = tostring(customDimensions.sessionId), Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| summarize AvgFeatures = round(avg(FeaturesUsed), 2), P50 = percentile(FeaturesUsed, 50), P90 = percentile(FeaturesUsed, 90) by Day
| order by Day asc
| render timechart
content.title: Feature Breadth (distinct features opened per session)
